name: GOLFTEC Huntington Beach
about: GOLFTEC Huntington Beach is a golf training center focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. Utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, GOLFTEC provides personalized coaching to help golfers improve their game through detailed swing analysis and strategic planning. The center offers a range of services including individual lessons, practice sessions, and professional club fittings designed to optimize performance. While primarily a training facility, GOLFTEC also provides access to training bays with launch monitors and video feedback, creating an environment for both structured coaching and independent practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion capture and launch monitor technology
Access to professional coaching for personalized improvement plans
Opportunity to practice with high-tech feedback in a structured environment
Custom club fitting services using launch monitors and shaft optimization
Pro shop offering gear at 10% off retail prices

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned as part of the technology for lessons and fitting.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides club fitting services and recommends using clubs tailored to your game, but you can bring your own clubs for lessons and practice.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and beverage services or policies regarding outside food and drinks in the provided information.

faq.answer: The time required for an 18-hole simulation is not specified in the provided content.

faq.answer: GOLFTEC mentions junior programs and technologies designed to help juniors see and understand their progress, but specific kid-friendly policies or amenities are not detailed.
